channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Food tracking just got lazy — in the best way possible — with this wearable
item.description: Counting calories just got easier with The Drop, the world's first automated nutrition tracker using advanced computer vision and artificial intelligence.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Andrew Ng is betting big on agentic AI
item.description: Andrew Ng came up with a theory almost 15 years ago: What if Google, the internet giant, thought of machines like the brain and trained neural networks on mass amounts of data using computational power in an attempt to lead to artificial general intelligence? Google bit on Ng’s line of thinking, an
item.dc:creator: Jessica Bursztynsky, Fast Company

item.title: AI cameras are giving DC's air defense a major upgrade
item.description: Artificial intelligence-based cameras are giving air defense operators unprecedented capabilities in monitoring and protecting airspace.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Democrat accuses Musk of tanking spending bill over China restrictions
item.description: The top Democrat on the House Appropriations Committee accused Elon Musk of tanking a bipartisan spending bill because it included a provision that could limit his businesses' ability to operate in China. In a Friday letter to congressional leaders, Rep. Rosa DeLauro (D-Conn.
item.dc:creator: Sylvan Lane, The Hill

item.title: Amazon workers are striking at multiple facilities. Here's what you should know
item.description: Amazon workers affiliated with the Teamsters union continued a strike Friday at seven of the company's delivery hubs just days before Christmas. At midnight on Saturday, workers at a prominent unionized warehouse in New York will also join, the Teamsters said.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: WordPress.org statement threatens possible shutdown for all of 2025
item.description: Automattic CEO Matt Mullenweg on Friday announced a shutdown of almost all services on WordPress.org, the open source project site that’s the home of the software, plugins, and the WordPress community, but was unclear on when the shutdown would end.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Usyk vs Fury 2 LIVE: fight stream, REPLAY, cheapest PPV deals, watch the rematch of the century
item.description: Eager to watch the Tyson Fury fight? Here are the best streams, the cheapest prices and how to watch all 12 rounds live online as The Gypsy King faces his old nemesis at Saudi Arabia's Kingdom Arena
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: VA EHR to resume rollout in mid-2026, after clinicians see fewer crashes
item.description: The VA says clinicians are seeing fewer interruptions from the new EHR, and that the average user now sees “near zero interruptions,” such as freezes or lags. The post VA EHR to resume rollout in mid-2026, after clinicians see fewer crashes first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jory Heckman, Federal News Network

item.title: Scholz dismisses Musk's assertion that only a far-right party can 'save' Germany
item.description: German Chancellor Olaf Scholz has dismissed an assertion by Elon Musk that only a far-right party can “save Germany.”.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Google Photos is getting a handy Quick Edit tool for sharing images, and I don’t know why nobody thought of this sooner
item.description: Google is rolling out a new feature for its Photos app called Quick Edit, which allows users to apply image processing on the sharing screen for a last minute touch-up.
item.dc:creator: jamie.richards@futurenet.com (Jamie Richards), TechRadar

item.title: Why software-defined perimeters (SDPs) are taking over where VPNs left off
item.description: Discover why Software-Defined Perimeters (SDP) are replacing outdated VPNs for secure, flexible network access.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Los CIO 100 Awards reconocen a Gasib con el Premio a la Innovación 2024
item.description: Una actitud innovadora es clave para las empresas que quieran estar a la vanguardia tecnológica en sus respectivos sectores.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: What is data architecture? A framework to manage data
item.description: Data architecture definition Data architecture describes the structure of an organization’s logical and physical data assets, and data management resources, according to The Open Group Architecture Framework (TOGAF).
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: We called 1-800-ChatGPT to see if OpenAI would ruin Christmas
item.description: OpenAI just launched a way to call ChatGPT over the phone as a means of introducing people to the generative AI service. Users in the U.S. and Canada can call 1-800-CHATGPT (1-800-242-8478) to chat with the service or ask questions for up to 15 minutes for free per month.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Bursztynsky, Fast Company

item.title: Transparency, efficiency, innovation: The digital transformation of policing in Kazakhstan
item.description: In the era of digital transformation, public safety stands at a critical crossroads. Law enforcement agencies globally are under increasing scrutiny to enhance transparency, efficiency, and trust within their communities.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Amazon workers strike at multiple facilities as Teamsters seek labor contract
item.description: Workers at seven Amazon facilities went on strike Thursday, an effort by the Teamsters union to pressure the e-commerce company for a labor agreement during a key shopping period.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Giant sloths and mastodons lived with humans for millennia in the Americas, new discoveries suggest
item.description: New discoveries from several archaeological sites in North and South America suggest that ancient people first arrived in the New World much earlier than scientists once thought.
item.dc:creator: Christina Larson, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Apple complains Meta requests risk privacy in spat over EU efforts to widen access to iPhone tech
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Apple complained that requests from Meta Platforms for access to its operating software threaten user privacy, in a spat fueled by the European Union's intensifying efforts to get the iPhone maker to open up to products from tech rivals.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Data on animal movements help Hungarian researchers create a swarm of autonomous drones
item.description: BUDAPEST, Hungary (AP) — Moving in a dense cloud, like throngs of people walking across a crowded public square, 100 drones maneuver through the night sky in Hungary's capital, the result of over a decade of research and experimentation that scientists believe could change the future of unmanned fli
item.dc:creator: JUSTIN SPIKE, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: FBI warning: Don't point lasers at mysterious drones
item.description: According to the FBI, pilots of manned aircraft are increasingly in danger of being blinded by lasers.
item.dc:creator: Liz Jassin, NewsNation

item.title: VA EHR seeing fewer crashes amid plans to resume rollout
item.description: VA’s Oracle-Cerner EHR has seen a 50% decrease in crashes and lags since the VA completed its last round of updates in August. The post VA EHR seeing fewer crashes amid plans to resume rollout first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jory Heckman, Federal News Network

item.title: Army lays out high level concepts for next-gen C2
item.description: Army PEO C3N is obtaining industry feedback as part of its market research as it develops solicitations for the next generation command and control effort. The post Army lays out high level concepts for next-gen C2 first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: That new Copilot key on your keyboard? It’s useless for business
item.description: Microsoft’s genAI-based Copilot app for Windows doesn’t work with Microsoft’s identity and access management platform Entra, prompting the company to advise organizations to uninstall the app and reconfigure the Copilot keyboard key to open the Microsoft 365 app instead.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: That text from the US Postal Service could be a scam. How to avoid ‘smishing’ fraud
item.description: Be careful in the final week before Christmas, because scammers are trying to use text messages to take advantage of you.
item.dc:creator: Tribune News Service, The Mercury News

item.title: Doomscrolling among teens leads to growing 'brain rot' concerns
item.description: The word brain rot increased by 240% in 2024 as health concerns over constant online scrolling among teens grows
item.dc:creator: Anna Kooiman, NewsNation

item.title: Barcelona subway recycles energy from braking into power to charge electric cars
item.description: BARCELONA, Spain (AP) — The Barcelona subway grinds to a halt, the doors slide open and commuters pour out to go about their daily business. Little do they know that as they do so, a burst of energy is sent up to street level to help charge an electric car.
item.dc:creator: JOSEPH WILSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: You have a license to code
item.description: One of the coolest things about software development is that you don’t need anyone’s permission to do it. If you need an application for your business or personal use, there isn’t a single thing stopping you from learning to code and writing it yourself.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: 2024 global network outage report and internet health check
item.description: The reliability of services delivered by ISPs, cloud providers and conferencing services is critical for enterprise organizations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: EU investigates TikTok over Romanian presidential election safeguards
item.description: LONDON (AP) — European Union regulators said Tuesday they're investigating whether TikTok breached the bloc's digital rulebook by failing to deal with risks to Romania's presidential election, which has been thrown into turmoil over allegations of electoral violations and Russian meddling.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Smarter devops: How to avoid deployment horrors
item.description: Many devops organizations implement advanced CI/CD, infrastructure as code, and other automations to increase deployment frequency. In the State of DevOps Report 2023, 18% of respondents were classified as elite performers for being able to deploy on-demand with change lead times of less than a day.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Senate report alleges Amazon rejected warehouse safety recommendations due to productivity concerns
item.description: At least two internal Amazon studies found a link between how quickly the online retailer's warehouse workers perform tasks and workplace injuries, but the company rejected many safety recommendations out of concern the proposed changes might reduce productivity, according to a U.S.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Schumer calls for Mayorkas to ‘deploy special drone-detection tech’ in New York, New Jersey
item.description: “I’m pushing for answers amid these drone sightings,” Schumer posted on X. “I’m calling for @SecMayorkas to deploy special drone-detection tech across NY and NJ.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, NewsNation
